title: The Lonely Battle of Thomas Reid
original_title: The Lonely Battle of Thomas Reid
overview: The story of Irish farmer Thomas Reid who, for years, has been locked in a grueling battle with his neighbor - U.S. microchip manufacturer Intel who want to expand into Reid’s land.
